scope_note: This panel summarizes the structured course-rigor and application-guidance notes currently exported for this school. It remains source-backed and does not infer missing requirements.

areas.name: Course rigor
areas.summary: USD expects a well-balanced college-preparatory secondary-school program and recommends completing at least four or five academic subjects each year while attempting accelerated coursework.
areas.detail: USD expects a well-balanced college-preparatory secondary-school program and recommends completing at least four or five academic subjects each year while attempting accelerated coursework.

areas.name: Recommendations
areas.summary: USD requires one academic recommendation from a high school counselor or a teacher who taught the applicant in an academic class; additional recommendations are optional.
areas.detail: USD requires one academic recommendation from a high school counselor or a teacher who taught the applicant in an academic class; additional recommendations are optional.

areas.name: Essays
areas.summary: First-year applicants must submit the Common Application essay and USD member questions.
areas.detail: First-year applicants must submit the Common Application essay and USD member questions.
